findings.message: No ## Output section; skill drives a log investigation but does not specify what structured evidence or root-cause summary the agent should produce.
Vague quantifier "relevant" in "Check these when the relevant run is older" — does not define a measurable threshold for when to check rotated logs.
No ## Output section; the terminal state (squash-merged PR) is implicit in the goals but not declared as a formal output.
Vague quantifier "judgment" in "Use judgment to identify flaky failures" — leaves flakiness detection undefined.
Vague quantifier "brief" in "with a brief reason (e.g., out-of-scope, conflicts with intent, unnecessary)" — length is undefined.
Vague quantifier "brief" (second occurrence) in "offer a brief alternative or follow-up trigger" — same pattern as line 211.
No ## Output section; pure reference guide but callers cannot infer what structured result (e.g. JSON payload, confirmation field) to expect from each operation.
No ## Output section; step 9 describes a merge summary inline but no dedicated declaration clarifies expected deliverable format.
Vague quantifier "minimal" in "Prefer minimal, intention-preserving edits" — does not specify how to measure edit minimality.
Vague quantifier "complex" in "For complex conflicts, search for related files" — leaves the threshold for "complex" undefined.
Reference to AGENTS.md without a path prefix; no root-level AGENTS.md exists in the repo — the file is at elixir/AGENTS.md. An agent searching from the workspace root will fail to locate it.
No ## Output section; step 8 mentions "Reply with the PR URL" inline but no dedicated output declaration exists.
Vague quantifier "proper" in "Write a proper PR title that clearly describes the change outcome" — does not define what makes a title proper.
Vague quantifier "clearly" in "Write a proper PR title that clearly describes the change outcome" — paired with "proper", both in the same instruction without concrete criteria.
